description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe, predominantly dark gray with a white Nike Swoosh logo on both sides and a white textured sole. The upper is constructed from a mesh-like synthetic material, providing breathability and flexibility, while the interior appears padded for comfort. The shoe features a standard criss-cross lacing system with matching dark gray laces and a slightly cushioned tongue. The heel and collar are reinforced and padded, offering additional ankle support. The outsole is white and appears to have a fine, grippy tread suitable for urban surfaces. Subtle signs of wear are visible on the toe and sole, indicating light use but overall good condition.
description: A dark gray Nike running shoe with a white Swoosh logo, mesh upper, and white textured sole, showing light signs of use. Features standard lacing and padded interior for comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, mesh upper, and lacing system with the tongue visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the prominent white Nike Swoosh logo and the full length of the white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded heel collar and the back of the white sole.
description_view_3: Right side view with another white Nike Swoosh logo and a clear look at the mesh texture and lacing.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on both sides of the shoe
